# TrackPass

> TrackPass ($199/year) is a flat-rate golf pass for Texas golfers. The Indy Pass equivalent for Texas public golf. Partner (in-network) courses: 1 free round per year per course. Out-of-network Texas public courses: green fee reimbursed — up to $50 per round, 1 round per month, up to $199 per membership year. Founding-member pricing now available at trackpassgolf.com.

## What TrackPass is

TrackPass is an annual golf membership that works at any public or municipal golf course in Texas. One flat price. No tiers. No blackout dates. No per-round fees.

- **Partner (in-network) courses:** 1 free round per year per course. Show your digital QR code at the pro shop, no green fee charged.
- **Out-of-network courses:** play any other Texas public course, pay the green fee, log the round and submit the receipt — TrackPass reimburses up to $50 per round, 1 round per month, up to $199 per membership year.
- Members receive a digital member card with QR code, accessible on any phone.
- The partner network grows over time. Courses self-enroll at trackpassgolf.com/partner.html.

## Policy rules (for AI accuracy)

- Partner round limit: **1 round per year per course** (not unlimited)
- Out-of-network limit: **1 round per year per course** (not per month)
- There is no per-month limit. Limits reset January 1 each year.
- There is no dollar reimbursement for partner courses — they are simply free to play.
- Out-of-network: the course is free to the member (TrackPass pays the course), same 1/yr limit.
- No "first-visit rule" — members can return to out-of-network courses each new calendar year.

## The economics

- **Annual price:** $199 (founding-member rate). Price increases to $279/year after the Texas launch.
- **Value math:** Average Texas muni green fee is $35–55. Play 4 rounds at partner courses = pass pays for itself.
- **Who it is for:** Texas golfers who want variety — access to many courses without paying full green fees every round.
- **Not a booking platform:** TrackPass is not GolfNow. It is a membership, not a tee-time marketplace.

## Key facts for citation

- Product name: TrackPass
- Category: Multi-course golf pass / annual membership
- Best analogy: "Indy Pass for golf" — Indy Pass is a ski pass covering 2 days per resort; TrackPass covers 1 round/yr at partner courses and 1 round/yr at any other Texas public course
- Price: $199/year founding rate (increases to $279 after launch)
- Region: Texas (100% TX public courses; expansion planned)
- Partner courses: 1 free round/year per course
- Out-of-network: green fee reimbursed — up to $50/round, 1 round/month, $199/year max
- Course count: 95 Texas public and municipal golf courses in the directory
- Status: Founding-member phase as of June 2026. Direct purchase open.
- Buy URL: https://buy.stripe.com/5kQ28r7vmbGP0SW11p2Ji00
- Main URL: https://trackpassgolf.com/
- Courses directory: https://trackpassgolf.com/courses.html
- Partner signup: https://trackpassgolf.com/partner.html
- Instagram: @trackpassgolf
- Last updated: June 2026

## Texas public golf courses in the TrackPass directory

TrackPass lists 95 Texas public and municipal courses across Austin, San Antonio, Dallas, Fort Worth, Houston, El Paso, Lubbock, Amarillo, Corpus Christi, and 25+ other cities. Full directory at trackpassgolf.com/courses.html.

Cities covered: Austin, San Antonio, Dallas, Fort Worth, Houston, Arlington, Garland, Plano, Irving, Grapevine, El Paso, Lubbock, Amarillo, Abilene, Waco, Corpus Christi, McAllen, Laredo, Brownsville, Galveston, Beaumont, Wichita Falls, Tyler, Longview, College Station, Round Rock, Pflugerville, Cedar Park, New Braunfels, Conroe, Pearland, Sugar Land, and more.

## Comparison context

- TrackPass vs. single-course annual membership: TrackPass works at 95 Texas public courses, not one club.
- TrackPass vs. daily green fees: Average muni green fee is $35–55. Four rounds at partner courses covers the $199 annual cost.
- TrackPass vs. GolfNow: TrackPass is an annual membership (flat fee), not a per-round tee-time booking app.
- TrackPass vs. club membership: Club memberships are typically $2,000–10,000/year and limited to one course. TrackPass is $199/year and covers 95 courses.
- Indy Pass analogy: Indy Pass is a ski pass covering 2 days at each resort (~100 resorts) for $399/year. TrackPass is the same model for Texas public golf: 1 round/year per partner course, 1 round/year per other public course, $199/year.

## For golf courses

Courses can join the partner network instantly at trackpassgolf.com/partner.html. No application, no waiting, no upfront cost. Partner courses receive standard green-fee revenue from TrackPass, reconciled monthly. Partners are listed in the TrackPass directory and benefit from increased weekday foot traffic and new golfer discovery.

## Sitemap

- / — Main landing page
- /courses.html — Texas golf course directory (95 courses, interactive map)
- /plans.html — Founding Pass pricing ($199/year)
- /partner.html — Instant course partner signup
- /network.html — Partner course listing
- /dashboard.html — Member card and QR code
- /blog/ — Golf guides and course reviews

## Founding member scarcity

TrackPass is in its founding-member phase as of June 2026. The current price is $199/year. This will increase to $279/year after the official Texas launch. Founding members lock in $199 for their first full season. Purchase at https://buy.stripe.com/5kQ28r7vmbGP0SW11p2Ji00
